title: Crix (disambiguation)
content:
'''Crix''' (or '''Krix''') was a personal name. In [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]], Crix was a common [[Gender/Legends|male]] name of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] origin.<ref name="Callsigns">{{GamerCite|8|Callsigns: Names of Corellia}}</ref> It could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Crix Madine]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[general]] at the [[Battle of Endor]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===People===
*'''[[Crix Exohusker]]''', member of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*'''[[Crix Griff]]''', [[Con artist]] living on [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]].
*'''[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]''', Rebel Alliance [[General/Legends|general]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
*'''[[Crix Masst]]''', Rebel Allaince general assassinated by [[Morteos]] on [[Sinded]].
*'''[[Crix Q5 Baobab]]''', instructor of [[Astronomer/Legends|astronomy]] and [[astrography]] at the [[Baobab Merchant Marine Academy]].
*'''[[Crix Sunburris]]''', [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and an ace [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] within the ranks of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi Starfighter Corps|Starfighter Corps]].
*'''[[Crix Yarrow]]''', an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] mayor [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]].

===Other===
*'''[[General Crix Madine Military Reserve]]''', aka '''Crix Base''', was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] military reserve over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*'''[[Crix-class diplomatic courier shuttle|''Crix''-class diplomatic courier shuttle]]''', a diplomatic shuttle used by the Galactic Alliance and later by the [[Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]].
**'''[[Unidentified Crix-class diplomatic courier shuttle]]''', shuttle aboard which [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]] traveled to [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]].
*'''[[Crix-class assault shuttle|''Crix''-class assault shuttle]]''', assault vessel used by the Galactic Alliance and later by the Galactic Alliance Core Fleet.

==See also==
*[[Krix (disambiguation)]]
